segments.text: Today is the 19th Sahastrara Day.
If you count,
The first one that day Sahasrara was opened
I'll have to tell You
a story about this Sahasra Day
About which it has been decided
long time back
before I incarnated
They had big meeting in the heavens
all the 35 crores of
Gods, the Deities were there present to decide what is to be done.
This was ultimate that we have to do
for human beings
To open their Sahastrara
Opened their awareness
to Spirit
The real knowledge of the Divine
Remove the darkness of ignorance
and it had to be spontaneously
because it has to work, the living force of God.

these perverted paths of destruction, how to tell them about all this established organizations.
For ages they have been ruling making money and power – it was a tremendous task had
be done with great patience and the love!
It is very delicate work also because they believed in those religions innocent people
To blast them that this is all nonsense, they are no religions.
They're against the Incarnation and against all the Prophets

And thats' Why Adi Shakti had take birth on This Earth

because sixth-of may was a doomsday in that year.

and every deity's job is allotted

very obedient they knew Me
very well completely dedicated
and devoted. They knew Me very, very well – every end of My hair they knew! I didn't

it's not selfish-love. It' snot the way we love my child ,my husband .My country
It is the love which is divine, which spreads from your heart and your spirit like a light
of knowledge.
What tremendous task it was!
So I said at Sahastrara I had to be Mahamaya – something that people can't recognize
Me easily, but that is no.

But he cannot cleanse others, while a Sahaja Yogi can cleanse others and cleanse himself.
So this is the superior most state which you achieved through your great punyaas I
should say!
so many of have been searching for truth in previous lives
